name: Al Tiramisu

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current restaurant-issued savory and dessert pages captured on 2026-07-14.
The current rendered catalog contains 18 savory products and seven desserts across four real sections.
All 25 frozen product names remain current; the other five frozen rows are the Dolci, INSALATE/ANTIPASTI/ZUPPE, LE PASTE, and SECONDI headings plus Menu Advisory.
The direct Wix items endpoint returned HTTP 403, but both official pages render the complete names, descriptions, sections, and prices server-side and were retained as hashed artifacts.
Al Tiramisu publishes selected fixed ingredient descriptions but no complete allergen matrix, complete recipes, or cross-contact policy.
Twenty current products have positive signals supported by fixed menu text or unavoidable composite formats; five remain unavailable rather than inferred.
Eleven frozen product rows mismatch current evidence: eight underreported, two overreported, and one mixed.

The explicitly flourless Torta Caprese is not assigned wheat/gluten, unspecified pasta is not assigned egg, and optional pistachio gelato flavor is not assigned as a fixed tree-nut claim across all choices.
No absent description or omitted allergen is interpreted as a negative or safety claim.
The frozen merge combined 25 Wix item rows with five structured section/advisory blocks and flattened every actual product into a generic Items category.
The correction reads the server-rendered section/name/description relationships from the two current official menu surfaces and restores all four real categories.
Positive mappings use only fixed descriptions and narrow composite terms such as ladyfingers and zabaglione; optional flavor text is masked where it is not common to every formulation.
Focused tests cover all 25 products, all five artifacts, category structure, and the material underreported and overreported allergen cases.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the current official site and confirmed the Washington, DC restaurant identity and menu navigation.
Captured and exhaustively reviewed 18 current products across the three rendered savory sections.
Captured and exhaustively reviewed all seven current Dolci products and descriptions.
Direct unauthenticated capture returned HTTP 403; the same current item fields were available in the retained server-rendered official pages.
Found selected item ingredient descriptions but no complete allergen matrix, recipes, or cross-contact disclosure.

findings.summary: Five of the 30 frozen rows are section headings or the menu advisory rather than purchasable products, while all 25 real products were flattened into a generic Items category.
findings.resolution: Removed all five structural rows and rebuilt exactly 25 current products across the four real rendered sections.

findings.summary: Eleven current products disagree with the frozen signals, including omitted Burrata, breaded calamari, pasta, clam, dessert, and gelato ingredients plus unsupported flourless-cake and optional-flavor claims.
findings.resolution: Recomputed 20 positive rows from fixed current text, removed unsupported claims, and kept five products unavailable without creating negative assertions.

findings.summary: The frozen extraction merged Wix item and section structures without respecting row type or section membership, contaminating the product list and losing all four source categories.
findings.resolution: Prepared a rendered-structure correction with explicit section, product, artifact, and source-semantic invariants.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 25-product Al Tiramisu catalog across four current restaurant-issued sections with 20 supported positive rows, five unavailable rows, and all structural/allergen defects corrected.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=/tmp/al-tiramisu-repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 25 items, four categories, 20 positive rows, five unavailable rows, and no heading/advisory artifacts)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 25 products, four categories, 20 positive rows, and five unavailable rows.
